dag.dag_name: Suppliers ASN delay cascades into Warehouse receiving schedule

tasks.dependencies: Waits on upstream domain A DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain B DAG completion
Waits on upstream domain C DAG completion
Requires all 3 upstream domains to have completed
Consolidates Product Master data across upstream domains

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_PRD_CASC' AS dag_id, 'consolidate_prd' AS task_name;

tasks.dependencies: Compares actual start time to expected upstream-completion time
Branch: no material cascade delay detected
Branch: cascade delay detected, triggers cross-DAG AutoRCA
Notifies stakeholders of cascade impact with root-cause chain

operator_config.sql: SELECT 1 AS autorca_probe, 'RTL_PRD_CASC' AS dag_id, 'load_target' AS task_name;

incident.incident_name: Suppliers ASN delay cascades into Warehouse receiving schedule
incident.description: Cascading Delay incident on the Product Master pipeline (RTL_PRD_CASC): suppliers ASN delay cascades into Warehouse receiving schedule.
incident.symptoms: Warehouse receiving-schedule DAG, which consumes ASN data via cross-DAG dependency, is delayed 4h.
incident.root_cause: Suppliers domain's ASN ingestion (see Stuck/Hung catalogue) hung on a vendor-portal sensor, and Warehouse's receiving-schedule DAG has no timeout-independent fallback, so the block fully cascades.
incident.business_impact: Dock scheduling for two inbound trucks delayed, causing driver detention charges and a backlog at the receiving dock.
incident.resolution: Add a fallback receiving-schedule path that runs off yesterday's ASN data with a manual-override flag if today's ASN data hasn't arrived within a defined grace window.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: Suppliers domain's ASN ingestion (see Stuck/Hung catalogue) hung on a vendor-portal sensor, and Warehouse's receiving-schedule DAG has no timeout-independent fallback, so the block fully cascades.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, cross-DAG lineage/dependency graph, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow lineage graph (cross-DAG) shows the dependency chain and timestamps confirming propagation
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog shows a synchronized delay signature: Suppliers DAG stuck event followed by Warehouse DAG sensor wait event
expected_rca.resolution: Add a fallback receiving-schedule path that runs off yesterday's ASN data with a manual-override flag if today's ASN data hasn't arrived within a defined grace window.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Require every cross-domain dependency in the metadata model to declare a documented fallback/degraded-mode behavior, not just a hard blocking wait.
